verification.subject: Verify your AudioGretel account
verification.title: Welcome to AudioGretel!
verification.subtitle: Let's verify your email address
verification.message: Thank you for registering with AudioGretel. To complete your registration and start creating amazing stories, please verify your email address by clicking the button below:
verification.cantClickButton: If the button above doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
verification.expiration: This verification link will expire in 24 hours.

passwordReset.subject: Reset your AudioGretel password
passwordReset.title: Password Reset
passwordReset.subtitle: Let's get you back into your account
passwordReset.heading: Reset Your Password
passwordReset.message: We received a request to reset your password. Click the button below to create a new password:
passwordReset.cantClickButton: If the button above doesn't work, copy and paste this link into your browser:
passwordReset.expiration: This password reset link will expire in 1 hour.
passwordReset.securityNote: If you didn't request this password reset, you can safely ignore this email.

welcome.subject: Welcome to AudioGretel!
welcome.title: Welcome to AudioGretel!
welcome.subtitle: Your journey begins here
welcome.heading: Welcome to Your Story Creation Journey!
welcome.message: We're excited to have you join our community of storytellers. Get ready to create amazing stories with our AI-powered platform.
welcome.featuresTitle: What you can do with AudioGretel:

features.freeStories: Create up to 3 free stories per month
features.customize: Customize your stories with different characters and settings
features.premium: Upgrade to Premium for unlimited stories and more features

welcome.footer: Thank you for choosing AudioGretel. We can't wait to see the stories you'll create!

system.emailServerReady: ✅ Email server ready to send messages

audioStoryGenerator.title: Audio Story Generator
audioStoryGenerator.description: Discover all the features of our AI tool to create unique audio stories

completeGuide.title: Complete Guide
completeGuide.description: Learn step by step how to create professional audio stories with artificial intelligence

audioStoryExamples.title: Audio Story Examples
audioStoryExamples.description: Listen to real examples of audio stories created with our AI technology
